title: FreeViz-Style Supervised Projection Approximation
objective: Create a supervised low-dimensional visualization of class separation using available tabular tooling.
method: Used an LDA axis as a documented FreeViz-style supervised projection approximation and paired it with a PCA axis.
results: The LDA axis is a documented FreeViz-style supervised projection approximation for the binary label.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
Projection includes the target during LDA fitting and is visualization-only, not an unbiased validation metric.
